_meta.description: Compliance check nodes for heating and cooling setpoints. Compares actual setpoint against building code baseline/limit and returns pass/fail indicator.

inputs.name: climate.heating.setpoint
inputs.description: Actual heating setpoint (h_23) -- for heating compliance

inputs.name: climate.heating.obcSetpoint
inputs.description: OBC required heating setpoint (m_23) -- for heating compliance

inputs.name: climate.cooling.setpoint
inputs.description: Actual cooling setpoint (h_24) -- for cooling compliance

inputs.name: climate.cooling.nbcLimit
inputs.description: NBC cooling upper limit (m_24) -- for cooling compliance

invariants.description: Always returns checkmark or X mark

behavior.condition: n_23: actual heating setpoint >= OBC required setpoint
behavior.note: Heating passes when setpoint meets or exceeds code requirement

behavior.condition: n_23: actual heating setpoint < OBC required setpoint
behavior.note: Heating fails when setpoint is below code requirement (PH 18 deg-C < residential 22 deg-C)

behavior.condition: n_24: actual cooling setpoint <= NBC limit
behavior.note: Cooling passes when setpoint does not exceed NBC upper limit

behavior.condition: n_24: actual cooling setpoint > NBC limit
behavior.note: Cooling fails when setpoint exceeds NBC 26 deg-C limit

edgeCases.handling: Heating compliance will fail: h_23=18 < m_23=22
edgeCases.rationale: PH setpoint of 18 deg-C is below OBC residential requirement of 22 deg-C

edgeCases.handling: parseNum with defaults: heating actual=21, required=22, cooling actual=24, limit=26
